overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a vast industrial complex with large white warehouse buildings under a clear blue sky. The character walks along concrete surfaces, briefly interacts with an electrical panel on a warehouse wall, and continues exploring the open concrete yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete industrial yard between warehouse buildings

events.description: character turns right to follow the main warehouse building wall

agents.ego_description: walking across open concrete area and turning to follow the warehouse wall

entered.detail: large white industrial warehouse with corrugated metal siding and gabled roof
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple lines
mountain range visible on the horizon under clear sky

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a vast open concrete yard with a large white industrial warehouse ahead. She walks forward then turns right to follow the building wall, with power lines visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior warehouse wall with utility fixtures

events.description: character stops at electrical panel mounted on warehouse wall

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping briefly to examine the electrical panel on the warehouse wall

entered.detail: gray metal electrical box with yellow warning symbols mounted on the warehouse wall
small metal staircase with railings attached to building exterior

segments.scene_description: Walking close to the warehouse wall, the character approaches a gray electrical panel with warning symbols. She stops briefly to examine it before continuing, with the building wall now dominating the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: long warehouse facade with horizontal windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the warehouse wall passing ventilation units and horizontal windows

entered.detail: long rectangular dark-tinted windows arranged horizontally on the warehouse wall
external HVAC units and vents mounted at ground level on the building

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the extensive warehouse wall, passing by horizontal windows and external ventilation units. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow as she moves along the building's length.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete tarmac at building corner

events.description: character turns right away from building wall into open concrete area

agents.ego_description: turning away from the warehouse wall and walking into the expansive open concrete area

entered.detail: low industrial building visible in the far distance across the concrete yard

segments.scene_description: Reaching the corner of the building, the character turns right and walks away from the warehouse into a vast open concrete tarmac. The building recedes to the left as she moves toward the open area with distant structures visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide industrial yard along the side of a massive warehouse and back out into an expansive open tarmac. It begins with the character walking across a vast concrete yard toward a large white industrial building before turning right to follow its perimeter under a clear blue sky. As she moves closer to the structure, the camera tracks her approach to a gray electrical panel with warning symbols, which she briefly examines before continuing forward. The scene then shifts to a steady follow as she passes a series of horizontal windows and external ventilation units that line the extensive warehouse wall. Finally, the character reaches the corner of the building and turns right, moving away from the warehouse as it recedes to the left and the view opens up toward distant structures on the horizon.
